text_original: Very good but so many adverts make it very distractive
text_zh: 非常好，但是广告太多了，让人非常分心。
reply_original: Thank you for the 5 stars! We are thrilled you're enjoying Fantasia. Regarding the ads, we hear you. Maintaining high-quality AI servers is costly, but we are working hard to balance the experience. If you have more suggestions to make the app less distracting, please email us at support@fantachat.ai. Your feedback helps us grow!
reply_zh: 感谢您的五星好评！我们很高兴您喜欢 Fantasia。关于广告问题，我们听到了您的反馈。维护高质量的 AI 服务器成本很高，但我们正在努力平衡用户体验。如果您有更多建议能让应用减少干扰，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。您的反馈将帮助我们成长！
